title: Elevate '23: Product Roadmap Session 🚀
excerpt:
If you’re listening in to our Product Roadmap Session, we want to hear how excited you are for all the epic new features we’re bringing to you in 2024.
  
I have to say, being able to connect up to 200 boards to dashboar…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re listening in to our Product Roadmap Session, we want to hear how excited you are for all the epic new features we’re bringing to you in 2024.

Screen Shot 2023-12-14 at 3.41.39 pm1920×675 52.9 KB

I have to say, being able to connect up to 200 boards to dashboard, the ability to reorder board views and managing guests in teams are 3 features on my list of favourite releases!

Tell us - which of the 6 product announcements are you MOST excited for?!

posts.author: Nickiboccer1 (Nicki Gilmour)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you please share a link explaining the linking to 200 boards in a dashboard please?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nicki!

You can rewatch our product roadmap session here, where we discuss in further detail
